findings.location: s3 (１件ごとの処理) — code block Javadoc comment
findings.description: The knowledge file omits the Javadoc comment from the `handle` method that lists the specific tables being physically deleted: SYSTEM_ACCOUNT, SYSTEM_ACCOUNT_AUTHORITY, UGROUP_SYSTEM_ACCOUNT, USERS. This is substantive information (which tables are affected) that an AI would need to answer questions about what this batch operation deletes.
findings.source_evidence: Source Javadoc: `* システムアカウント:SYSTEM_ACCOUNT`, `* システムアカウント権限:SYSTEM_ACCOUNT_AUTHORITY`, `* グループシステムアカウント:UGROUP_SYSTEM_ACCOUNT`, `* ユーザ情報:USERS`
